# Yashvardhan Singh Shaktawat

Official Portfolio & Resume

This website belongs to Yashvardhan Singh Shaktawat.

## Info & Specializations

- Full Stack Web Developer
- React.js & Next.js Developer
- MERN Stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js)
- Python & Django Backend Engineer
- AI & Machine Learning Specialist (scikit-learn, NLP, Computer Vision, YOLOv8)
- Internet of Things (IoT) Developer (ESP32, microcontrollers)

## Main Portfolio Sections

- **About**: Profile description, background in Computer Science Engineering, development style, and philosophies.
- **Skills**: Detailed list of programming languages, frameworks, AI/ML tools, and databases.
- **Projects**:
  - *Maharaj AI*: AI-powered recipe recommendation platform (Django, scikit-learn, TF-IDF).
  - *WeaveMind*: IoT/AI Textile loom defect monitor using custom-trained YOLOv8.
  - *LabManagerPro*: Real-time workstation screen supervisor (Django, Redis, WebSockets, sub-500ms streaming).
  - *SolarMonitor-IoT*: Smart energy telemetry system utilizing ESP32 microcontrollers.
  - *CryptoCoin*: Multi-module financial portal aggregating cryptocurrency pricing.
- **Education**: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering.
- **Contact**: Reachable via Email (ys537781@gmail.com) or using the on-site contact form.
